title: Annamanada Mahadeva Temple
tagline: Annamanada Mahadeva Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Annamanada Mahadeva Temple is a Hindu temple located at Annamanada in Thrissur district, Kerala.
overview.description: Annamanada Mahadeva Temple is a Hindu temple located at Annamanada in Thrissur district, Kerala. The presiding deity of the temple is Shiva. The shivling is almost four feet tall and is considered as the Kirathamoorthy in a pleasing mood while giving Pashupatastra to Arjuna. It is considered to be one of the 108 Shiva Temples in ancient Kerala, believed to have been consecrated by Sage Parashurama, the Sixth avatara of Lord Vishnu.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Kallur Thekkummuri
topPlaces.description: Kallur Thekkummuri is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Annamanada
topPlaces.description: Annamanada is a village in a southern corner of Thrissur district in the Indian state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Mambra
topPlaces.description: Mambra is a small but rich village, northern part in the Thrissur district and Southern part in Ernakulam Dt of Kerala, south India.

topPlaces.name: Erayamkudy
topPlaces.description: Erayamkudy is a small village in the Thrissur District of the Kerala state of India. This village is on the shore of the Chalakudy River with an ancient temple, Erayamkudy Bhagavathi Temple.

topPlaces.name: Parakkadavu
topPlaces.description: Parakkadavu (English: The ferry of rock) is a village situated along the banks of the Chalakkudi river in Ernakulam district in the Indian state of Kerala. Local paddy fields are fed by the Chalakkudi river.

topPlaces.name: St. Mary's Syro-Malabar Catholic Church, Koratty
topPlaces.description: Korattymuthy at Koratty Church is the locally known name of Hail Mary or Mother Mary of Syro-Malabar Catholic community at Koratty in Kerala State, India. Korattymuthy's Shrine is famous for its annual feast with 'Poovankula' (a special plantain), Muttilizhayal (walking on knee) offerings.

image.alt: St. Mary's Syro-Malabar Catholic Church, Koratty

topPlaces.name: Koratty
topPlaces.description: Koratty is a census town in Thrissur district in the Indian state of Kerala. It is a main centre of Marian pilgrimage.

topPlaces.name: Poovathussery
topPlaces.description: Poovathussery is a village in the border between Ernakulam district and Thrissur district of Kerala, India. It is situated on the banks of Chalakudy River and has several paddy lands and coconut trees.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Annamanada Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Annamanada Mahadeva Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Annamanada Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (12 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (30 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Annamanada Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Annamanada Mahadeva Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Annamanada Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Annamanada Mahadeva Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Annamanada Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kallur Thekkummuri, Annamanada, Mambra, Erayamkudy, Parakkadavu.
